info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Credit Management API
info.description:
Manage customer credit limits, credit exposure, and credit checks in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_CREDIT_MANAGEMENT) enables automated credit risk assessment during sales order processing, including reading credit accounts, credit exposure data, and managing credit limits for business partners.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
